title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Zomato Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Zomato Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Zomato Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Kanpur-based team.

About Zomato Digital Technologies:
Zomato Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato Digital Technologies!
